meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Scale Your Freelance Dev: Debugging with AI (Beginner Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with scaling your freelance projects. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to master AI-driven debugging and ship faster than ever.
content.answer_block: Scaling freelance projects requires offloading technical debt to AI. By integrating Antigravity for systematic code analysis and Claude Code for terminal-based refactoring, you transform debugging from a manual bottleneck into an automated workflow. This reduces your time-to-market, ensures consistent code quality, and allows you to handle higher-complexity client requirements.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, a client is waiting, and your codebase has become a tangled web of technical debt. You are stuck in the 'freelancer's trap'—where every new feature request breaks two existing ones, and your velocity hits a wall. The dream of a scalable agency is dying under the weight of manual debugging.

But the paradigm has shifted. Modern AI-native tooling allows you to bypass the manual trace-and-patch cycle. By leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code, you can treat your codebase as a queryable database, turning hours of frustration into minutes of automated resolution. It is time to stop coding like a hobbyist and start shipping like a system architect.

steps.title: Contextualize the Codebase
steps.description: Before debugging, you must map the dependencies. Use Antigravity to generate a structural overview of your project architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory, map all primary function dependencies, and identify potential circular references or high-complexity modules.

steps.title: Automated Error Trace
steps.description: Feed your error logs into Claude Code to isolate the root cause without manually stepping through the stack trace.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the following error log [Insert Log]. Identify the exact line of code causing the state mismatch and propose a fix.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "analyze the error in error.log and propose a fix"

steps.title: Refactor for Scalability
steps.description: Once the bug is fixed, refactor the surrounding module to prevent regression using architectural patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified module to follow SOLID principles, specifically focusing on decoupling the data layer from the UI components.

steps.title: Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Lock in your fix by generating automated tests that ensure the bug never returns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test suite that covers the edge cases for the refactored function, including negative testing for null inputs.

steps.title: Commit and Document
steps.description: Automate your documentation so your client understands the technical improvements made during the debugging session.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a concise technical summary of the fix and the architectural changes for the client changelog.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message "fix: resolve state race condition in auth module"

pro_tips: Always run 'claude map' before starting a new project to give the AI full context of your folder structure.
Use Antigravity to compare your current code against industry-standard boilerplates to spot architectural drift early.
Never accept an AI fix without asking it to explain the 'why' behind the change to prevent hidden side effects.
Keep your prompt library in a local Markdown file; reuse your most effective debugging prompts across different client projects.
Treat your terminal as the primary IDE; minimizing window switching between browser, editor, and CLI increases focus state.
content.next_steps: After completing these steps, implement a CI/CD pipeline that runs your generated tests on every push, ensuring your scaling efforts remain sustainable.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your freelance career. Harness the power of AI to reclaim your time, double your output, and deliver enterprise-grade code to your clients. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
